goal: Prove that chat answers can improve because Cortex retrieval ran first.

tests.title: Ask A Question That Should Benefit From Stored Knowledge
tests.objective: ask a question that should benefit from stored knowledge
preconditions: The epic requirements and technical spec are available.
The current implementation plan is up to date.
procedure: Review the relevant requirements, technical spec, and implementation-plan.json entries for this deliverable.
Execute or inspect the implementation work needed to prove the scenario.
Capture evidence under tests/ and record any gaps back into the epic artifacts.
expected_results: ask a question that should benefit from stored knowledge
failure_conditions: retrieval is never called before answer generation
answer quality does not improve meaningfully
